data.title: Stripe unleashes stablecoin accounts in 100+ countries
data.description:
Stripe, the global payments giant, has rolled out stablecoin-powered accounts for users across more than 100 countries.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stripe-unleashes-stablecoin-powered-accounts/

data.title: OCC Confirms Banks Can Offer Crypto Custody and Execution Services
data.description:
The clarification confirms that banks may buy or sell crypto-assets held in custody at the direction of their customers.
source: https://coindoo.com/occ-confirms-banks-can-offer-crypto-custody-and-execution-services/

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launches mog/acc, GIGGLES, and pitcoin tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) has launched Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens mog/acc, GIGGLES, and pitcoin. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section.

Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC), and Base are supported.

data.title: Arizona Enacts Bitcoin Reserve Law as Binance's CZ Weighs In
data.description:
Arizona legislates Bitcoin reserves; Binance's Zhao comments on investment timing amid state's new policy.
source: https://coincu.com/336308-arizona-bitcoin-reserve-law-binance-cz

data.title: The previously stolen lending agreement Loopscale will resume withdrawals tomorrow night
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Solana ecological lending protocol Loopscale, which was previously hacked, officially announced that it plans to resume withdrawals at 10:00 EST on May 9 (22:00 Beijing time on May 9). Although the protocol update patch has been audited, the initial 24-hour withdrawal amount for each user will still be limited: SOL deposit users can withdraw up to 2,500 SOL every 24 hours, USDC and USDG users can withdraw up to 500,000 USDC/USDG every 24 hours, and jitoSOL users can withdraw up to 500 jitoSOL every 24 hours.
According to previous news, Loopscale was hacked last month due to a security vulnerability, and about 5.7 million USDC and 1,200 SOL were stolen. After negotiation with the hacker, all the lost funds have been recovered.

data.title: The eighth address in the Trump dinner is suspected of clearing its position, and transferred out more than 400,000 Trumps four days ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain data monitoring, the address currently ranked eighth in the TRUMP dinner ranking transferred a total of more than 408,000 TRUMPs to Meteora through two transactions four days ago, which was worth about 4.68 million US dollars at the price at that time. Currently, the address has only 0.079 TRUMPs left, and it is suspected that the liquidation operation has been completed. However, since the TRUMP dinner ranking is weighted by time, the address is still retained in the eighth place.

data.title: Potential Security Risk Identified in t3rn Script
data.description: According to Odaily, a cryptocurrency key opinion leader, @Xuegaogx, has revealed a potential security risk in a script shared by X user @hao3313076. The script, associated with t3rn, allegedly contains a backdoor that could silently transmit users' private keys to a Telegram account with the ID 5963704377. This function disguises its true operation by masquerading as a configuration log output, while actually including the plaintext private keys.

data.title: Arizona Governor Officially Enacts Bill to Create State-Managed Fund to Hold Unclaimed Crypto
data.description:
Arizona Governor Hobbs signed House Bill 2749 into law, which allows the state to establish a reserve fund to hold unclaimed crypto, airdrops.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/arizona-governor-officially-enacts-bill-to-create-state-managed-fund-to-hold-unclaimed-crypto/

data.title: USD1 Rises to Seventh Largest Stablecoin Globally
data.description: According to Foresight News, as reported by Cointelegraph, USD1 has ascended to become the seventh largest stablecoin in the world. Its market capitalization has reached $2.2 billion.

data.title: Whale Address Closes BTC Short Position After Price Surge
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale address has closed its Bitcoin short position following a significant price increase in BTC. The decision resulted in an overall loss exceeding $1.6 million.

data.title: Crypto KOL: A user-written t3rn script is suspected to contain a backdoor, and the private key may be silently sent to Telegram
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto KOL @Xuegaogx disclosed that the t3rn script released by X user @hao3313076 is suspected to have a backdoor risk. Combined with the private key input call logic, the user's private key can be silently sent to the account with ID 5963704377 through the Telegram API. The function disguises the real behavior by disguising the log output as a configuration record, and the actual content contains the plaintext private key.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
A whale closed his BTC short position and lost more than $1.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @lookonchain monitoring, after the BTC price rose sharply, a whale address chose to close its BTC short position, with an overall loss of more than 1.6 million US dollars.

data.title: Whales withdraw 500 billion PEPE from Binance, and the current total holding value reaches 17.36 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, an address recently withdrew 500 billion PEPE from Binance, which is equivalent to about 4.35 million US dollars at the current price. The address currently holds about 2 trillion PEPE, with a total value of 17.36 million US dollars.

data.title: Texas House committee passes Bitcoin reserve bill for full floor vote
data.description:
A Texas House Committee has passed a Republican-backed bill to create a Bitcoin reserve, which now only needs a successful full floor vote before heading to the governor’s desk. The Texas House Committee on Delivery of Government Efficiency passed Senate Bill 21 with no amendments on May 7 in a 9-4 vote along party lines. The bill has already passed the Texas Senate, in a 25-5 vote on March 6. SB 21 would establish the “Texas Strategic Bitcoin Reserve,” controlled by the state’s comptroller — currently Glenn Hegar — who would be permitted to invest in digital assets that have obtained a market cap of at least $500 billion over the last twelve months, which would currently only include Bitcoin (BTC)
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/texas-house-committee-passes-bitcoin-reserve-bill-for-full-floor-vote?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

Donald Trump teases a major trade deal with a big country, sending crypto markets into a sea of green.

data.title: CZ: The option to buy Bitcoin before the government is disappearing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder CZ cited the news that Arizona has officially legislated the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act on the X platform, and said: Investors can buy when the government starts buying or after the government buys, and the option of "before the government buys" is gradually disappearing.

data.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman to Focus More on Research and Security
data.description: According to Foresight News, OpenAI founder Sam Altman announced via a tweet that a co-founder of the Metrodora Institute has joined the team as the CEO of applications. Altman stated that he will continue in his role as CEO of OpenAI but will now be able to concentrate more on research, computing, and security under the new arrangement.

data.title: The current winning probability of DOOD’s whitelist activity on OKX Wallet is 1.15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official website, the whitelist activity launched by Doodles and OKX Wallet currently has more than 173,000 participants. Users who hold more than 0.1 SOL in their wallets and complete the corresponding interactive tasks can participate in the DOOD token subscription. The number of whitelists is 2,000, and the current winning probability is 1.15%.
